summary: Admin customers page successfully displays in mobile narrow viewport with proper state handling, truthful customer data, and accessible controls. The interface correctly shows the success state with customer table, search functionality, and quick actions as specified.

violations.description: Table headers could benefit from better visual hierarchy in mobile view - some column labels appear cramped
violations.evidence: Column headers in mobile table view show tight spacing

actions: Consider improving mobile table header spacing for better readability
Verify horizontal scroll behavior works smoothly for all table columns
